title: Leonard A. Lauder Decides Not to Stand for Re-Election to The Estée Lauder Companies Board of Directors
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Estée Lauder Companies announced today that Chairman Emeritus Leonard A. Lauder has informed the Company of his decision not to stand for re-election to the Company's Board of Directors (the “Board”) at the annual meeting in November. Leonard Lauder remains Chairman Emeritus of the Company. title: Estee Lauder eyes recovery as perfume and make-up show mettle
text: Estee Lauder confirmed it had been a tough year for the perfume, makeup and skincare group, though things started to improve in the final three months. Revenues fell 10% to US$15.9 billion in the year to end June 2023 with Asia travel the major weak spot and overshadowing good performances elsewhere in Asia, Europe and the Middle East.

title: Estee Lauder's stock falls after earnings beat is offset by soft guidance
text: Estee Lauder Inc.'s stock EL, -0.04% fell 2% premarket Friday, after the cosmetics company posted better-than-expected earnings for its fiscal fourth quarter but offered guidance that lagged consensus. The company had a net loss of $33 million, or 9 cents a share, for the quarter to June 30, after earnings of $52 million, or 14 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: The Estée Lauder Companies Reports Fiscal 2023 Results
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) today reported net sales of $15.91 billion for its fiscal year ended June 30, 2023, a decrease of 10% from $17.74 billion in the prior year. Organic net sales fell 6%, primarily driven by Asia travel retail in Hainan and Korea, partially offset by growth in nearly every market in both Asia/Pacific and Europe, the Middle East & Africa (“EMEA”). title: Estée Lauder earnings expected to reflect ongoing Asia travel retail challenges
text: Estee Lauder Companies Inc (NYSE:EL)'s fiscal fourth quarter and full year 2023 financial results are expected to show the continued impact of a slower than initially expected recovery of Asia travel retail, with declines on the top and bottom lines forecast for both the June quarter and the fiscal year.   The cosmetics giant is due to report its latest results before the opening bell in New York on Friday, August 18, 2023.

title: The Estée Lauder Companies to Webcast Discussion of Fiscal 2023 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results on August 18, 2023
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) will release its fiscal 2023 fourth quarter and full year results on August 18, 2023. On that date, at 9:30 a.m. (ET), the Company will provide a live webcast of its conference call discussing the results, future prospects and recent corporate developments. Fabrizio Freda, President and CEO, and Tracey T. Travis, EVP and CFO, will host the call. Those wishing to access the webcast can visit http://www.elcompanies.com/investor.
